mapper.select: SELECT APPROVAL_ID, SCENARIO_ID, PROJECT_ID, SCENARIO_NAME, VERSION_NO, ACTION, APPROVER, REVIEWER, APPROVAL_NOTE, OVERALL_JUDGMENT, SNAPSHOT_JSON, CAST(CREATED_AT AS VARCHAR) AS CREATED_AT FROM CAP_NEW_APPROVAL ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT APPROVAL_ID, SCENARIO_ID, PROJECT_ID, SCENARIO_NAME, VERSION_NO, ACTION, APPROVER, REVIEWER, APPROVAL_NOTE, OVERALL_JUDGMENT, SNAPSHOT_JSON, CAST(CREATED_AT AS VARCHAR) AS CREATED_AT FROM CAP_NEW_APPROVAL WHERE SCENARIO_ID = #{scenarioId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
